text.title: ADR AI-Drafted With Review Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a named approver available within the decision window?

conclusion.verdict: skip — defer until approver available; do not auto-merge

branch.question: Is context bundle within token budget?

conclusion.verdict: draft ADR via LLM with attribution + approver gate

example.trace: input matches `approver_available == true` → sub-question → `bundle_within_budget == true` → conclusion ref=`ai-attribution-flag`.
